messages.text: Project Atlas has officially kicked off. I'm the project lead.

text_entities.text: Project Atlas has officially kicked off. I'm the project lead.

messages.text: Staging is up — the payments API is enabled and serving test traffic.

text_entities.text: Staging is up — the payments API is enabled and serving test traffic.

messages.text: Carol joined the team today as our backend engineer.

text_entities.text: Carol joined the team today as our backend engineer.

messages.text: Decision: the database is PostgreSQL, hosted on AWS.

text_entities.text: Decision: the database is PostgreSQL, hosted on AWS.

messages.text: Heads up — the payments API is now disabled while we run a security review.

text_entities.text: Heads up — the payments API is now disabled while we run a security review.

messages.text: We finished migrating the database to GCP.

text_entities.text: We finished migrating the database to GCP.

messages.text: The launch deadline is set for Q3 2026.

text_entities.text: The launch deadline is set for Q3 2026.

messages.text: Good news: the payments API is re-enabled — the security review passed.

text_entities.text: Good news: the payments API is re-enabled — the security review passed.

messages.text: Org update: Carol is now the tech lead for Project Atlas.

text_entities.text: Org update: Carol is now the tech lead for Project Atlas.
